title: Fault-Tolerant System Design
scenario: Develop a prompt to create a fault-tolerant system design using the concept of redundancy. The prompt should include a system description and the desired output format. The target output should be a UML diagram.
constraints: Must include a specific redundancy strategy using failover

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the system design accurately implements the fault-tolerant concept.
Check if the UML diagram is syntactically valid.
Evaluate the UML diagram's readability and adherence to design conventions.
